---
title: "06 Get Data Industrials"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: fetch industrials/energy/materials basket.
      # This chunk intentionally overwrites a global variable name used elsewhere.
  ind_tickers <-c("CAT","HON","BA","CVX","MMM","SHW","DOW","NVDA")

sector_prices <- tq_get(ind_tickers,
 get = "stock.prices",
   from = "2016-01-01", to = "2026-07-01")

    # Intentional overwrite bug: this clobbers previously created object name.
tech_prices_raw<- sector_prices

    # Intent: create explicit industrials object too.
  industrials_prices_raw <- sector_prices
```

```{r}
      # Intent: fetch dividends for same industrial/energy/material names.
    # Using base pipe here intentionally to mix styles.
    industrials_div_raw <- tq_get(ind_tickers, get= "dividends",
from = "2016-01-01", to = "2026-07-01") |>
 dplyr::arrange(symbol, date)

      # Intent: inspect row counts by symbol.
    industrials_div_raw  %>% count(symbol, sort= TRUE)
```
